text = "Freedom and justice are ideals we must pursue relentlessly. Freedom is the path to prosperity and peace."
word = "freedom"

def count_word(text, word):
    text = text.lower()
    word = word.lower()
    count = 0
    for i in range(len(text)):
        if text[i:i+len(word)] == word:
            count += 1
    return count

P.S.: Your response must have 4 sections. Section 1
text is a string that may contain multiple words and punctuation. Section 2
the function counts the occurrences of the specified word in the text. Section 3
the function is case insensitive, so "Freedom" and "freedom" are counted as the same word. Section 4
the function returns an integer representing the count of the word in the text.
